__Type__

* Bots
* scrapers
* Naughty IPs

__Source URL__

https://www.example.com/naughty-bots.txt
https://www.example.com/script-kiddies.tar.gz
https://www.example.com/scrapers.zip

__Update frequency__

Explain how often this list updates and how.
